scope: Normalized metadata only; no raw assistant transcript retained

sessions.title: Adding new source files to index

topology.strategy: source workers followed by destination-owned shared-file workers

sessions.outcome: completed without recorded rollback; shared destinations were coordinator-assigned in follow-up work

sessions.title: Adding new files in sources/ to index

topology.strategy: three parallel source writers, then three sequential retries

prompts: incorporate the new (not already added to the index) files in sources/; analyze the task and let subagents do the work in small chunks.
stop. parallel subagents mangled files with parallel edits. how about we roll back all okf changes not added to the index and retry your plan sequentially?
sessions.intervention: User directed rollback of affected unstaged OKF edits and sequential retry.
sessions.outcome: recovered sequentially; raw PDF processed with pdftotext

sessions.title: okf-review skill incorporation changes review
sessions.outcome: Ready; missed terminal section order, two Bahrain misroutes, warning-baseline proof, and high-similarity custody webs

sessions.title: Concept file consolidation Pass 1 survey
sessions.outcome: valuable clusters but over-broad reads, incomplete changed-set scope, inconsistent homes, and unresolved ownership
